---
format: revealjs
title: Inhalte onlinebringen
subtitle: Barcamp PHBern
date: 12 02 2024
---

## {.unlisted}

> a fool with a tool is still a fool
> 
::: quelle
Grady Booch?
:::

<br>

> let's fool around
> 
:::quelle
General Johnson
:::


# Praxis

## RStudio 🍺{.smaller}

::::columns

:::column

#### Homebrew:

 `brew install --cask r`
 
 `brew install --cask rstudio`

:::
:::column

#### Old fashioned:

[https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/](https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/)


:::center
{{< qrcode https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/ width=300 height=300 >}}
:::
:::
::::

## Quartopub

[https://quartopub.org/](https://quartopub.org/)

<iframe src="https://quartopub.com/" width="100%" height="400" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen="true" mozallowfullscreen="true" webkitallowfullscreen="true"></iframe>


## 👩‍💻 🧑‍💻 👨‍💻 

::::columns

:::column

![](images/groupwork_adobe.jpg){fig-align="center"}

:::quelle
Adobe Firefly: "people working together looking super smart"
:::

:::
:::column

![](images/not_groupwork_adobe.jpg){fig-align="center"}

:::quelle

Adobe Firefly: "people not working together looking super dumb"
:::

:::
::::

:::{style="text-align: center;font-size:2em"}
🤔
:::

## {background-iframe="sonja-test-js.html"   background-interactive=true}

# ☕️ ?

# Theorie

## Mark ⬆️ und Mark ⬇️


## 🧠 + 🤖 = 🦾{.incremental}

<p style="background: linear-gradient(45deg, violet, indigo, blue, green, yellow, orange, red);
             -webkit-background-clip: text;
             color: transparent;
             display: inline-block;
             font-size: 2em;">
    Hello, Rainbow Text!
  </p>

. . .
  
<p style="animation: sparkle 1s infinite; color: #fff; font-size:2em">

This text will sparkle!
<style>
@keyframes sparkle {
0% { color: #fff; }
50% { color: #ffcc00; }
100% { color: #fff; }}
</style>
</p>

. . .

<p style="animation: jiggle 0.5s ease-in-out infinite; font-size:2em">
This text will jiggle!
<style>
            @keyframes jiggle {
                0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
                25% { transform: translateX(-5px); }
                50% { transform: translateX(5px); }
                75% { transform: translateX(-5px); }
}
        </style>
</p>  

. . .

<div style="font-family: 'Arial Black', sans-serif;
                font-size: 36px;
                color: #3498db;
                text-align: center;
                margin: 50px;
                text-shadow: 3px 3px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
                animation: pulse 2s infinite;font-size:2em">

WordArt is back, 👶!

<style>
            @keyframes pulse {
                0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
                50% { transform: scale(1.1); }
            }
        </style>
</div>

## Free and Open Source

# ☕  ?

# Recht 👨‍⚖️ 

## Datenschutzrecht {.unlisted}


  
## Urheberrecht 

## PHRecht {.unlisted}
